scripts.desktop:build:macos-arm64: node scripts/tauri-build.mjs --target aarch64-apple-darwin && node scripts/collect-release.mjs --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.desktop:build:macos-x64: node scripts/tauri-build.mjs --target x86_64-apple-darwin && node scripts/collect-release.mjs --target x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.desktop:build:windows-x64: node scripts/tauri-build.mjs --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc && node scripts/collect-release.mjs --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
